rule: This packet converts the final finish blocker boundary into operator decisions. It is not mutation authority and does not create a write plan.
stop_rules_before_write: Stop if the proposed adjudication is not explicitly approved.
Stop if exact Grookai row IDs are missing.
Stop if rollback artifacts are missing.
Stop if post-apply verification queries are missing.
Stop if evidence supports a different finish or card number than the row under review.

rows.reason_not_promoted: Evidence distinguishes cracked ice holo from the base card; this audit does not collapse cracked_ice into holo.
rows.next_action: Classify as finish-label conflict unless an exact plain holo source is found.
evidence_labels: Bulbapedia release info identifies a Cracked Ice Holofoil version in the Plasma Claw Theme Deck.
PriceCharting tracks Druddigon [Cracked Ice Holo] #94 as a separate product.
PriceCharting base Druddigon #94 product includes non-holo/regular-sale context.
rows.future_write_shape_if_approved: Treat the plain holo claim as unsupported. Preserve or model cracked_ice_holo only through a distinct source-backed finish, never by collapsing it into holo.
required_before_write: Confirm Grookai row IDs affected by the plain holo claim.
Confirm cracked_ice_holo is represented separately before any cleanup proposal.
Generate dry-run removal/isolation package with rollback artifact.
rows.source_attempt_recommendation: Blocked from promotion: exact evidence currently indicates a finish-label or card-number conflict. Needs manual adjudication, not more broad source acquisition.
rows.acceptance_rule: No write may be planned unless exact affected row IDs, rollback artifact, and post-apply verification are present.

rows.reason_not_promoted: Available exact source context does not support normal finish.
rows.next_action: Classify as possible unsupported normal unless an exact normal-source record is found.
evidence_labels: PokeScope exact card page identifies Emerald #107/106 Farfetch'd as Rare Secret with Market Price (TCG holofoil).
rows.future_write_shape_if_approved: Treat the normal claim as unsupported unless an exact normal source appears. Do not replace it by inference; the supported context points to secret rare/holo context.
required_before_write: Confirm exact Grookai row IDs affected by the normal finish claim.
Confirm whether supported secret rare/holo finish already exists as a distinct printing.
Generate dry-run removal/isolation package with rollback artifact.

rows.acceptance_rule: No write may be planned unless exact affected row IDs, rollback artifact, and post-apply verification are present.

rows.reason_not_promoted: Exact league/stamped evidence points to 187a/214, not exact card number 187/214.
rows.next_action: Resolve numbering/alias identity before any promotion.
evidence_labels: Bulbapedia release info identifies the Pokémon League Yellow A Alternate card as English card no. 187a/214.
PkmnCards identifies Net Ball Lost Thunder #187a/214 as Alternate.
Magic Stronghold product page identifies Net Ball (Pokemon League) #187a/214 Reverse Holofoil.
rows.future_write_shape_if_approved: Do not promote stamped #187. Evidence points to #187a/214, so this needs a numbering/alias or child-print plan before any canonical mutation.
required_before_write: Confirm whether Grookai has or needs a separate #187a identity.
Confirm stamped evidence belongs to #187a only.
Generate dry-run alias/child-print package with rollback artifact and post-apply verification.
